name: pl_rls_sync
description: FIP Power BI RLS AAD Sync Pipeline. Resolves FINDING B-03 (manual RLS membership). Reads rls_roles.json, resolves AAD group members via Microsoft Graph API, and synchronises Power BI dataset role membership via REST API. Runs daily at 05:00 CET (before dashboard refresh) and after every PROD deployment.

properties.description: Synchronise Power BI RLS role membership from AAD groups. Runs before the daily Power BI dataset refresh.

activities.name: Validate environment variables
activities.description: Pre-flight check: verify all required env vars are set in Key Vault-linked config before executing sync.

scripts.text:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN '$(POWERBI_PROD_WORKSPACE_ID)' = '' THEN 1/0  -- will fail if blank
        WHEN '$(POWERBI_PROD_DATASET_ID)'   = '' THEN 1/0
        ELSE 1
    END AS preflight_ok;

activities.name: Sync RLS via Azure Function
activities.description: Calls the FIP RLS Sync Azure Function (HTTP trigger) which internally runs sync_rls_aad.py. Returns 200 on success with a JSON body containing role sync statistics.

authentication._comment: Authentication is handled by the x-functions-key header above. ADF 'Anonymous' type means no additional bearer token is added, which is correct when using Azure Function host/function keys.

activities.name: Evaluate sync result
activities.description: Check the Azure Function response. Fail the pipeline if sync_status != 'success' so ADF alerts are triggered.

message.value: @concat('RLS sync failed: ', activity('Sync RLS via Azure Function').output.error_message)

activities.name: Log sync result to audit
activities.description: Write RLS sync audit record to audit.batch_log with role counts and any delta changes.

text.value:
@concat(
  'INSERT INTO audit.batch_log (batch_id, pipeline_name, pipeline_run_id, entity_code, period_key, status, started_at, completed_at, records_processed, error_message) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), ''pl_rls_sync'', ''',
  pipeline().RunId,
  ''', ''ALL_ENTITIES'', NULL, ''PASSED'', ''',
  pipeline().TriggerTime,
  ''', NOW(), ',
  activity('Sync RLS via Azure Function').output.total_changes,
  ', NULL);'
)
